name: Mattress
description: Client (F/38) and her husband operate a household of 11 with 8 young children living within, 5 of whom are under the age of 10, one of whom has moderate to servere autism. Client is unable to work due to physical health and caregiving concerns, her husband is the sole income earner and the family faces challenges meeting monthly expenses. The family recently got rid of an old and lumpy queen-sized mattress which several of their children sleep on, and require a new one.

name: Sofa
description:
Client is a single mother caring for her 9-year-old daughter and is currently dependent on ComCare assistance to meet the family's basic needs.

Following an incident involving her ex-partner, essential kitchen fixtures, including the kitchen cabinet and gas stove, were damaged and are no longer usable. As client has limited financial means and is prioritising her daughter's daily needs and household expenses, she is unable to replace these items independently.

The loss of these kitchen facilities has affected the family's ability to prepare meals safely and conveniently at home. Donations of a kitchen cabinet and gas stove, or suitable replacement items, would help restore a safe and functional living environment while alleviating the family's financial strain during this challenging period.

name: Laptop
description:
The client is a single mother with four children aged 13, 11, 9, and 5. She is a Permanent Resident and works in retail sales, putting in long hours to support her family.
The family resides in a 1-room HDB rental flat together with the children’s grandmother, who assists with caregiving. Despite the client’s consistent employment, the family continues to face financial constraints due to household expenses and the demands of raising four children.
The client shared that she previously supplemented her income by running a small online business selling masks, which was doing relatively well. However, she has been unable to continue after her laptop became unusable.
A laptop would support the family by allowing the client to explore restarting her online business, which could help improve the family’s financial situation. The device can also be shared within the household when needed.
The client remains motivated to provide for her children and has demonstrated initiative in seeking ways to supplement her income. This support would provide both practical and financial benefit to the family.(Cla)

contact.org: THK Family Service Centre @ Bedok North
contact.name: Low Kim Yong

passiton.name: Laptop bag
passiton.description: Acer laptop bag. Was a free gift with laptop but never used.

name: Adult Diapers

The client is an elderly lady who is widowed and living with her grand-daughter. She has experienced many life challenges, one of which is a physical disability. As such, she is unfit for work. 

She needs to wear a specific brand of diapers, called Depend Protect+, Absorbent pants, size L.

She also needs to take Fybogel (Orange), which is costly for her.
